text: I received the wrong item, and it's affecting my plans for the week. I need a refund, not store credit, as I had my heart set on the original product. This has caused me unnecessary stress.
I can't log into my account. Reset links don't work, said expired, can you help?
I received the wrong item in my order, but I also want to return the right one if that ever arrives. Can I get a refund instead of a replacement?
My app crashes every time I try to log in. I also saw some error message, but I can't remember it exactly. It's been super frustrating!
I need a refund for my order. The item I received is not what I expected and the quality is really bad. I'm really disappointed.
I think the app is broken. it says my login is incorrect but I know it's right. sometimes it works, but not now. can you check? I don’t get why it stops.
the api isn't working, i keep getting errors on my requests. it's really confusing, can you help?
Hey, I've been trying to log into my account, but it keeps saying my password is wrong even though I'm sure it's right. Can someone help? I think something's messed up.

I'm extremely frustrated. My order was supposed to arrive yesterday, but it didn't. I've received no updates, and it's disappointing. This isn't the first time I've faced such issues with your service.
I've lost access to my account after changing my phone. Can you assist me in recovering it?
is there a way to access older versions of the API?
i received the wrong item and now nobody is responding to my messages, really frustrating.
Hey, so like, is there a way to, um, get discounts for students? Also, how would I go about applying for it? Thanks!

I would like to formally request a refund for my recent purchase, as the item did not match the description provided on your website. I placed my order over two weeks ago, and despite several attempts to reach customer service, I have not received any satisfactory response. Furthermore, the delay in processing the refund is quite frustrating. Please find attached the order confirmation and the product's return label as proof of my claim. Thank you for your attention to this matter.
I've been waiting for a response on my refund for over a week now, please provide an update.
Quick question - does the platform support multiple user accounts? Thanks!
The product I received is not what was advertised. I want my money back. This is not what I expected at all.

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction regarding the product I purchased. It has not performed as advertised, causing significant inconvenience. I expected a reliable item based on the claims made on your website, but unfortunately, it has not met my expectations. I would like to formally request a refund for this purchase as it clearly does not fulfill its promised functionality.

Dear support team, I am experiencing issues with the application; it crashes frequently when I attempt to log in. This is affecting my ability to use your services. Please assist in resolving this matter at your earliest convenience. Thank you.

Dear Support Team, I am currently experiencing an issue accessing my account. I tried resetting my password multiple times, but I never received the reset link in my email. This has prevented me from logging in for several days now, which is quite concerning as it restricts my ability to manage my subscription. I appreciate any assistance you can provide to help me regain access as soon as possible.

Hello support team, I hope this message finds you well. I would like to inquire if there are any existing limitations regarding the number of API calls that can be made to the search endpoint within a single hour. I have noticed some inconsistencies in the response times and would appreciate any clarification on this matter. Thank you for your assistance.
